Behind OPINIO

A glimpse into the people and purpose powering OPINIO — A Student Feedback Management Platform.

Behind the Development of OPINIO

OPINIO is designed and developed by Syed Numan Pasha, a Bachelor of Engineering (B.E.) student in the Department of Computer Science and Engineering (CSE) at Navodaya Institute of Technology, Raichur, Karnataka. With a strong interest in software development and educational technology, OPINIO is developed to modernize and streamline the student feedback process, making it more efficient, transparent, and data-driven for academic institutions and replacing the traditional manual hardcopy feedback submission systems.

Connect via LinkedIn

Institutional Support & Management

OPINIO is managed under the guidance of Dr. Shoaibuddin Madni, Coordinator of the Internal Quality Assurance Cell (IQAC) and Associate Professor in the Department of Electronics and Communication Engineering (ECE) at Navodaya Institute of Technology, Raichur, Karnataka.

Through the support and supervision of IQAC, OPINIO has been implemented and is being used within the institution (with more than 2000+ users).

Secure and flexible storage of all feedbacks, with many customisable features,

Instant feedback results and visual analysis, quality assessment, and continuous academic improvement.

OPINIO — A Multi-Featured Student Feedback Management Platform.

OPINIO — #every students opinion matters.
